series.name: PROSPACE+
series.subtitle: Adaptable, Upgradable, Universal
series.description: Modular shelving for light loads, enabling optimum use of storage space. Clip-in assembly without tools. Suitable for warehouse, workshop, office and retail.
features: Load capacity up to 2,100 kg per pair of uprights
Height up to 5,000 mm in one piece
Load up to 275 kg per shelf (evenly distributed)

products.name: PROSPACE+ Tubular Shelf
products.description: Tubular shelves with front beams, side beams and inner tubes. Directly attached to uprights. Available with hardboard, galvanised sheet or mesh cover.

specs.Cover Options: Hardboard, galvanised sheet metal, metal mesh

accessories.name: Hardboard Shelf Cover
accessories.description: Covers the tubular shelf frame to create a flat surface for small items.

accessories.name: Galvanised Sheet Cover
accessories.description: Metal sheet covering for the tubular frame.

accessories.name: Metal Mesh Cover
accessories.description: Wire mesh covering, ideal for sprinkler-equipped environments.

accessories.name: Wire Dividers
accessories.description: Vertical dividers to organize items on shelves.

accessories.name: Wire Mesh Back Panel
accessories.description: Galvanised wire mesh for rear stability and fall protection.

accessories.name: Central Stop
accessories.description: For double-access storage configurations.

accessories.name: Retention Tray
accessories.description: With grating, for chemical storage.

accessories.name: Signage Plate
accessories.description: For labelling shelf contents.

features: Standard finishes: grey epoxy RAL 7016 or galvanised

products.metaDescription: PROSPACE+ tubular shelving: clip-in assembly, up to 275 kg/shelf, depths 300-1000mm. Professional storage solutions for warehouses and workshops in Finland & Baltics.
products.fi_description: Putkihyllyt etupalkeilla, sivupalkeilla ja sisäputkilla. Kiinnittyvät suoraan pystytolppiin. Saatavana kovalevykansi, galvanoitu pelti tai verkkokansi.
products.fi_metaDescription: PROSPACE+ putkihylly: modulaarinen varastohylly kevyille kuormille. 24 vakiomittaista hyllyvaihtoehtoa. Ammattitason varastointiratkaisu Suomeen ja Baltiaan.

products.name: PROSPACE+ Metal Sheet Shelf
products.description: Cold-rolled steel shelves with 12-fold edge box profiles for high resistance. Perforated every 45 mm for accessories. Edge accepts adhesive or magnetic labels.

specs.Labelling: Edge accepts adhesive or magnetic labels
specs.Frame Versions: Open Frame (bracings) or Closed Frame (lateral metal sheets)

loadTable.title: Metal Sheet Shelving — Uniformly Distributed Load (kg)

accessories.description: Lockable metal doors to close one or several bays.

accessories.name: Load Bar & Hooks
accessories.description: To showcase products on the shelving.

accessories.name: Plastic Tray Holder
accessories.description: Holder for plastic storage trays.

accessories.name: Raised Edge
accessories.description: Keeps products securely on the shelf.

accessories.name: Mobile Divider
accessories.description: Creates adjustable spaces (45 mm pitch).

accessories.name: Metal Sheet Partition
accessories.description: Creates fixed slots (45 mm pitch).

accessories.name: Wire Dividers
accessories.description: Adjustable wire dividers (45 mm pitch).

accessories.description: Bottom closing panel for the shelving unit.

accessories.name: Frame Bracing
accessories.description: Open frame structural bracing.

accessories.name: Cross Bracing
accessories.description: Additional structural reinforcement.

products.metaDescription: PROSPACE+ metal sheet shelving: cold-rolled steel, 12-fold edge profiles, up to 350 kg/shelf. Durable professional storage from Baltscand.
products.fi_description: Kylmävalssatut teräslevyhyllyt, 12-kertaisen reunaprofiilin ansiosta erittäin kestävät. Saatavana kahdella runkotyypillä eri kuormituksille.
products.fi_metaDescription: PROSPACE+ metallilevyhylly: kestävät teräslevyhyllyt 12-kertaisella reunaprofiililla. Ammattitason varastointi Suomeen ja Baltiaan.

products.name: PROSPACE+ Workshop & Store Room
products.description: Complete workshop and store room storage solutions using PROSPACE+ modular shelving. Purpose-configured for tools, parts, supplies and equipment in workshops, maintenance areas and back-of-store rooms. Combines tubular and metal sheet shelves for mixed-load storage.

specs.Load Capacity: Up to 2,100 kg per pair of uprights
specs.Shelf Load: Up to 275 kg per shelf (evenly distributed)

products.metaDescription: PROSPACE+ workshop and store room shelving: modular storage for tools, parts and supplies. Clip-in assembly, no tools needed. Finland & Baltics.
products.fi_description: Kokonaisvaltainen työpaja- ja varastotilaratkaisu PROSPACE+-modulaarihyllystöllä. Työkalujen, osien, tarvikkeiden ja laitteiden varastointiin.
products.fi_metaDescription: PROSPACE+ työpaja- ja varastotilahylly: modulaarinen ratkaisu työkaluille ja tarvikkeille. Napsautuskiinnitys ilman työkaluja.

products.name: PROSPACE+ High-Rise Storage
products.description: High-rise PROSPACE+ shelving configurations reaching up to 5 metres in a single upright. Designed for applications where vertical space utilisation is critical — archives, warehouses and distribution centres. Multi-level access with walkways and staircases.

specs.Load Capacity: Up to 2,100 kg per pair of uprights
specs.Shelf Load: Up to 275 kg per shelf (evenly distributed)

products.metaDescription: PROSPACE+ high-rise shelving: up to 5m single upright with multi-level walkway access. Maximum vertical storage utilisation. Finland & Baltics.
products.fi_description: Korkea PROSPACE+-hyllyjärjestelmä jopa 5 metrin yhtenäisellä pystytolpalla. Usean tason kulkuteillä ja portailla. Arkistoihin, varastoihin ja jakelukeskuksiin.
products.fi_metaDescription: PROSPACE+ korkeavarastointi: jopa 5 m yhtenäinen pystytolppa, usean tason kulkutiet. Maksimoitu pystyvarastointi.

products.name: PROSPACE+ Semi-Tôlé Shelf
products.description: Hybrid shelving combining a tubular frame structure with galvanised sheet metal side panels. Offers the structural versatility of tubular construction with enclosed aesthetics and item retention of sheet metal sides. Cross-braced back for rigidity. Ideal for retail, workshop and office environments.

specs.Shelf Type: Semi-Tôlé (hybrid tubular frame + sheet metal sides)

accessories.name: Painted Back Panel
accessories.description: Rear closing panel in epoxy paint finish.

accessories.name: Galvanised Back Panel
accessories.description: Rear closing panel in galvanised steel.

accessories.name: Swing Doors
accessories.description: Lockable hinged doors to close one or several bays.

accessories.name: Wire Dividers
accessories.description: Adjustable wire shelf dividers.

accessories.name: Metal Sheet Partition
accessories.description: Fixed metal dividers for compartmentalisation.

products.metaDescription: PROSPACE+ Semi-Tôlé hybrid shelving: tubular frame with sheet metal sides. 940/1210mm lengths, 400-600mm depths. Professional storage for Finland & Baltics.
products.fi_description: Yhdistelmähylly, jossa putkimainen runko ja galvanoidut metallilevysivupaneelit. Ristituettu taustapaneeli. Ihanteellinen myymälöihin, työpajoihin ja toimistoihin.
products.fi_metaDescription: PROSPACE+ Semi-Tôlé-yhdistelmähylly: putkimainen runko metallilevysivuilla. Ammattitason varastointiratkaisu.

products.name: PROSPACE+ Archive Shelf
products.description: Tubular shelving configured for archive and document storage. 7 shelf levels at 2,200 mm height with 350 mm depth optimised for standard archive boxes. Available in single-access (350 mm) or double-access (700 mm) depth. Clean aesthetic with no front-facing perforations, suitable for offices, hospitals and administrative environments.

specs.Shelf Finish: Epoxy paint RAL 7035 or Sendzimir galvanised

accessories.description: For labelling shelf contents and archive references.

products.metaDescription: PROSPACE+ archive shelving: 7-level tubular shelving for document and archive box storage. 350/700mm depth, 2200mm height. Professional archive solution.
products.fi_description: Putkihylly arkisto- ja asiakirjavarastointiin. 7 hyllytasoa, 2 200 mm korkeus, 350 mm syvyys arkistolaatikoille. Yksi- tai kaksipuolinen käyttö.
products.fi_metaDescription: PROSPACE+ arkistohylly: 7-tasoinen putkihylly asiakirjojen ja arkistolaatikoiden varastointiin. Ammattitason arkistoratkaisu.

products.name: PROSPACE+ Archive Shelf (Semi-Tôlé)
products.description: Semi-sheet metal archive shelving with enclosed side panels and cross-braced backs. 7 shelf levels at 2,200 mm height with 350 mm depth, optimised for archive box storage. The enclosed design prevents items falling from the sides — ideal for office and administrative archive rooms.

products.fi_description: Semi-Tôlé-arkistohylly suljetuilla sivupaneeleilla ja ristituetulla taustalla. 7 hyllytasoa, 2 200 mm korkeus, 350 mm syvyys. Toimisto- ja hallintoarkistoihin.
products.fi_metaDescription: PROSPACE+ Semi-Tôlé-arkistohylly: suljetut sivupaneelit arkistotiloihin. 7 tasoa, 2 200 mm korkeus.

series.fi_description: Modulaariset hyllyt kevyille kuormille – varastotilan optimaaliseen hyödyntämiseen. Napsautuskiinnitys ilman työkaluja. Soveltuu varastoon, työpajaan, toimistoon ja myymälään.
fi_features: Kuormitus jopa 275 kg hyllyä kohti (tasaisesti jakautunut)

series.name: PRORACK+
series.tagline: Store Your Medium-Heavy and Bulky Loads
series.subtitle: Practical, Sturdy, Modular
series.description: Racking for manually handled medium-heavy and bulky loads. From 150 to 1,200 kg per level. Height up to 6 metres. Tested in accordance with European standard FEM 10.2.02.
features: Load from 150 to 1,200 kg per level
Height up to 6,000 mm in one piece

products.name: PRORACK+ Frames
products.description: Cold-rolled 6-fold uprights with horizontal and diagonal bracing. Reversible uprights. Available dismantled, bolted or welded. Type 1.5 (up to 3.5 t) or Type 2 (up to 4.8 t).

specs.Frame Type 1.5: Up to 3,500 kg per frame (1.5 mm thickness)
specs.Frame Type 2: Up to 4,800 kg per frame (2 mm thickness)

accessories.name: Base Plate
accessories.description: For ground anchoring of frames.

accessories.name: Levelling Plate
accessories.description: Adjustable plate for uneven floors.

accessories.name: Tie Bar
accessories.description: Maintains regular spacing between two rows of frames.

accessories.name: Upright Junction
accessories.description: To raise an existing unit by connecting additional frame height.

accessories.name: Safety Pin
accessories.description: Holds beams securely in position on the frame.

products.metaDescription: PRORACK+ racking frames: cold-rolled steel uprights, heights up to 6m, depths 400-1500mm. Medium-heavy load storage for Finland & Baltics.
products.fi_description: Kylmävalssatut galvanoidut teräsrungot. Kantavuus jopa 3 000 kg. Jatkuva korkeudensäätö 50 mm välein. Kolme profiilityyppiä eri kuormituksille.
products.fi_metaDescription: PRORACK+ rungot: galvanoidut teräsrungot jopa 3 000 kg kantavuus. Ammattitason hyllyjärjestelmä Suomeen ja Baltiaan.

products.name: PRORACK+ Beams
products.description: Reversible beams from 1,000 to 2,700 mm length. Load up to 1,240 kg per level. 4 beam types: Rectangular, Oval, Type B, Type Z.

specs.Finish: Yellow epoxy paint RAL 1028 (except Type Z)
specs.Beam Types: Rectangular (40x30, 60x30), Oval (40x20), Type B (45x30, 70x30), Type Z (72x30)

products.metaDescription: PRORACK+ beams: 4 beam types, loads 150-1200 kg/level, lengths 1006-2706mm. Tested to FEM 10.2.02 European standard.
products.fi_description: Neljä palkkityyppiä eri kuormituksille ja leveyksille. Maalatut palkit (RAL 1028 keltainen) lukitaan varmistustapeilla.
products.fi_metaDescription: PRORACK+ palkit: neljä palkkityyppiä 150–1 200 kg kuormitukselle. Ammattitason hyllyjärjestelmä.

products.name: PRORACK+ Coverings & Accessories
products.description: Choose coverings based on product type and environment. Chipboard, solid wood, wire-mesh or galvanised sheet metal trays. Plus dividers, partitions and wire mesh sides.

specs.Chipboard Decking: 19 mm and 25 mm thickness — most cost-effective solution
specs.Solid Wood Decking: For dirty products (oil, grease) and sprinkler-equipped areas
specs.Wire-Mesh Decking: Zinc-plated, for sprinkler systems and visibility
specs.Decking Stop: Locks chipboard panel on rectangular beams
specs.Panel Support Bracket: Locks sheet metal trays on rectangular beams
specs.Safety Bar: Placed on rectangular beams for reinforcement or bulky load support

accessories.name: Decking Stop
accessories.description: Locks the chipboard panel on the rectangular beams.

accessories.name: Panel Support Bracket
accessories.description: Locks sheet metal trays on the rectangular beams.

accessories.name: Safety Bar
accessories.description: Placed on rectangular beams to reinforce chipboard or support bulky loads without covering.

accessories.name: Tie Bar
accessories.description: For Type B crosspieces. Reinforces chipboard panel.

accessories.name: Horizontal Divider
accessories.description: Creates spaces to store long products vertically.

accessories.name: Support Divider
accessories.description: For level division.

accessories.name: Wire Divider
accessories.description: For level division, adjustable.

accessories.name: Vertical Sheet Metal Partition
accessories.description: For level division.

accessories.name: Wire Mesh Backing
accessories.description: Encloses the rear of a unit for fall protection.

accessories.name: Wire Mesh Side
accessories.description: Equips a frame side for fall protection.

accessories.name: Perforated Sheet Metal Side
accessories.description: Wall addition to showcase products using hooks.

products.metaDescription: PRORACK+ coverings & accessories: chipboard, wire mesh, steel sheet and solid wood decking. Complete your racking system.
products.fi_description: Neljä tasovaihtoehtoa: lastulevytaso, metallitaso, teräsritiläpohja ja puukannella. Valitse tuotteiden, käyttöympäristön ja budjetin mukaan.
products.fi_metaDescription: PRORACK+ kansirakenteet: lastulevy-, metalli-, ritilä- ja puutasot. Valitse käyttöympäristön mukaan.

products.name: PRORACK+ Tire Rack
products.description: Purpose-built tire storage using PRORACK+ frames and beams. Tires rest directly on beams without coverings, allowing drainage and ventilation. Multi-level storage up to 6 metres for garages, dealerships and warehouses.

specs.Coverings: None required — tires rest directly on beams

products.metaDescription: PRORACK+ tire rack: multi-level tire storage up to 6m height, 150-1200 kg/level. Professional tire storage for garages and dealerships in Finland & Baltics.
products.fi_description: Erityisesti renkaiden varastointiin suunniteltu ratkaisu PRORACK+-rungoilla. Renkaat lepäävät suoraan palkkien päällä ilman kansirakennetta.
products.fi_metaDescription: PRORACK+ rengashylly: monitasoinen rengasvarastointi jopa 6 m korkeuteen. Ammattitason ratkaisu.

products.name: PRORACK+ Garment Rack
products.description: Garment hanging configuration using PRORACK+ frames with horizontal hanging rails. For clothing storage in retail, laundry, uniform management and textile warehouses. Can combine upper shelf levels for boxed items above hanging garments.

specs.Options: Can be enclosed with curtains or doors for dust protection

accessories.name: Hanging Rail
accessories.description: Chrome or galvanised rail for garment hangers, mounts between uprights.

accessories.name: Curtain/Door Enclosure
accessories.description: Fabric curtains or solid doors to protect garments from dust.

products.metaDescription: PRORACK+ garment rack: hanging rails for clothing storage in retail, laundry and warehouses. Professional garment racking from Baltscand.
products.fi_description: Ripustusjärjestelmä vaatteiden ja tekstiilien varastointiin. Ripustustangot ja lisävarusteet integroituna PRORACK+-runkoon.
products.fi_metaDescription: PRORACK+ vaatehylly: ripustusratkaisu vaatteiden ja tekstiilien varastointiin. Ammattitason ratkaisu.

products.name: PRORACK+ Dynamic Flow Racking
products.description: FIFO dynamic racking with roller conveyors integrated into PRORACK+ frames. Cartons loaded at rear flow by gravity to picking face. Ideal for order picking, e-commerce fulfilment and high-throughput warehouses.

specs.Flow Method: Gravity roller conveyors or inclined wheel lanes

accessories.name: Roller Conveyor Lane
accessories.description: Gravity roller track fitted between beams for carton or bin flow.

accessories.name: Wheel Lane
accessories.description: Inclined wheel track for lighter items and smaller cartons.

accessories.name: Lane Divider
accessories.description: Separates individual flow lanes within a level.

accessories.name: End Stop
accessories.description: Prevents cartons from falling off the picking face.

products.metaDescription: PRORACK+ dynamic flow racking: FIFO gravity roller conveyors for order picking. High-throughput warehouse solutions from Baltscand.
products.fi_description: Kallistetut rullaradat FIFO-periaatteella. Täyttö takaa, keräily edestä. Vähentää fyysistä kuormitusta ja nopeuttaa keräilyä.
products.fi_metaDescription: PRORACK+ dynaaminen painovoimahyllytys: FIFO-rullaradat tehokkaaseen keräilyyn. Ammattitason varastointi.

products.name: PRORACK+ Carton & Bin Storage
products.description: High-density compartmentalized storage for small parts, cartons and bins. Closely-spaced beam levels with vertical dividers create individual compartments. Ideal for spare parts, e-commerce SKUs and small-item warehousing.

accessories.name: Vertical Sheet Metal Partition
accessories.description: Divides a level into individual compartments.

accessories.name: Wire Divider
accessories.description: Adjustable divider for flexible compartment sizing.

accessories.name: Label Holders
accessories.description: Clip-on label holders for compartment identification.

products.metaDescription: PRORACK+ carton & bin storage: compartmentalized racking for spare parts and small items. Professional storage from Baltscand.
products.fi_description: Väliseinillä varustettu hyllyjärjestelmä pienten ja keskisuurten tuotteiden lajitteluun ja varastointiin. Säädettävät lokerot.
products.fi_metaDescription: PRORACK+ lokerovarastointi: väliseinillä varustettu hyllyjärjestelmä tuotteiden lajitteluun. Ammattitason ratkaisu.

products.name: PRORACK+ Platform & Mezzanine
products.description: Multi-level storage platforms built on PRORACK+ frames. Doubles or triples floor space by adding walkable levels above ground floor racking. Includes staircases, safety railings and access gates.

specs.Structure: Built on PRORACK+ frames with walkable flooring
specs.Flooring Options: Chipboard, steel grating or solid steel deck
specs.Safety Features: Railings, toe boards, safety gates, staircases

accessories.name: Staircase
accessories.description: Steel staircase with handrails for safe access between levels.

accessories.name: Safety Railing
accessories.description: Perimeter railing with toe board on all open platform edges.

accessories.name: Self-Closing Safety Gate
accessories.description: Swing gate at loading points, closes automatically for fall protection.

accessories.name: Platform Flooring
accessories.description: Chipboard, steel grating or solid steel deck panels.

products.metaDescription: PRORACK+ platform & mezzanine: multi-level storage platforms on racking frames. Double your warehouse floor space with Baltscand.
products.fi_description: Monitasoratkaisu PRORACK+-runkojen varaan. Kulkuteillä varustettu taso, joka hyödyntää rakennuksen koko korkeuden.
products.fi_metaDescription: PRORACK+ tasoratkaisu: monitasoinen hyllyratkaisu kulkuteillä. Ammattitason varastointiratkaisu.

series.fi_description: Hyllyjärjestelmä manuaalisesti käsiteltäville keskiraskaille ja tilaa vieville kuormille. Monipuolinen ratkaisu työpajoihin, varastoihin ja keräilyyn.

series.name: PROPAL 3
series.tagline: Store Your Heavy Loads and Pallets
series.subtitle: Flexible, Reliable, Efficient, Practical
series.description: High-performance pallet racking. Capacity up to 18 tons per frame and 6,000 kg per level. Loading height up to 10 metres. Designed per EN 15512 and EN 15620.
features: Capacity up to 18 tons per frame
Load up to 6,000 kg per level
10 depths (600 to 1,500 mm), 28 heights (1,800 to 10,000 mm)
Indoor and outdoor use with canopy/cladding

products.name: PROPAL 3 Static Pallet Racking
products.description: Standard pallet racking for heavy loads. HEL steel construction. Available with safety accessories including nets, pallet stops, corner protections and loading instructions.

specs.Origin: Guaranteed French origin, certified by Bureau Veritas

accessories.name: Anti-Collapse Net/Mesh
accessories.description: Fall protection at the back or sides of the racking.

accessories.name: Pallet Stop
accessories.description: Prevents pallets from being pushed through.

accessories.name: Vertical Divider
accessories.description: Separates storage locations on the same level.

accessories.name: Horizontal Divider
accessories.description: Creates sub-levels for different product heights.

accessories.name: Reel Holder
accessories.description: Arms for storage of cable drums and reels.

accessories.name: Upright Corner Protection
accessories.description: Protects uprights from forklift impact.

accessories.name: Upright Shoe-Type Protection
accessories.description: Heavy-duty upright base protection.

accessories.name: Single/Double Lateral Protection
accessories.description: Side protection available in wood or metal tubes.

accessories.name: Safety Bars
accessories.description: For different pallet dimensions on same level or to reinforce coverings.

accessories.name: Platform Stop
accessories.description: Positions the pallet more easily in its slot.

accessories.name: Foam Protection
accessories.description: Soft protection for uprights and beams.

accessories.name: Loading Instructions
accessories.description: Signage specifying load capacity and level heights.

accessories.name: Dynamic Covering
accessories.description: Converts static level into dynamic box picking solution.

accessories.name: Pallet Drawer
accessories.description: Easier product retrieval with access on three sides.

products.metaDescription: PROPAL 3 pallet racking: frame capacity up to 18 tonnes, heights to 10m, EN 15512 certified. Heavy-duty warehouse storage.
products.fi_description: Perinteinen kuormalavahylly suoralla trukkilähestyksellä. Kantavuus jopa 18 tonnia per kehikko, kuormitus jopa 6 000 kg per taso. Lastauskorkeus jopa 10 metriä.
products.fi_metaDescription: PROPAL 3 staattinen kuormalavahylly: kantavuus 18 t per kehikko, 6 000 kg per taso. Ammattitason varastointi.

products.name: PROPAL 3 Drive-In / Drive-Through
products.description: Store pallets in large quantities with limited SKUs. Saves space by removing aisles. Drive-In (LIFO) or Drive-Through (FIFO) configurations. Bracing tower or corner bracket stabilisation.

specs.Drive-In: LIFO — goods in/out on the same side
specs.Drive-Through: FIFO — handling from either side, first in/first out
specs.Bracing Tower: Stabilises without restricting aisle depth. 1 tower per 11 aisles.
specs.Corner Brackets: Stabilises without losing storage surface on ground.
specs.Rail Bracket 50 mm: For overhanging pallet up to 50 mm
specs.Rail Bracket 100 mm: For overhanging pallet up to 100 mm
specs.Rail Bracket 200 mm: For overhanging pallet up to 200 mm
specs.Railing Capacity: Thickness 2 mm, galvanised, max reach 2,000 mm

products.metaDescription: PROPAL 3 drive-in/drive-through racking: LIFO and FIFO configurations for high-density pallet storage. Maximise warehouse space.
products.fi_description: Kertymähyllystö suurten kuormalavamäärien varastointiin rajoitetulla nimikemäärällä. Ajo sisään (LIFO) tai läpiajo (FIFO). Säästää tilaa poistamalla käytävät.
products.fi_metaDescription: PROPAL 3 kertymähyllystö: drive-in LIFO tai läpiajo FIFO. Tilaa säästävä ratkaisu suurille kuormalavamäärille.

products.name: PROPAL 3 Pushback Carrier
products.description: LIFO pushback accumulation storage. Operator doesn't enter the unit. Up to 9 pallets deep, loads up to 1,200 kg per pallet. Reduces risks of collision and falling products.

specs.Operation: Gravity return — operator never enters the unit
specs.Loading: Pallets dropped at aisle entrance on mobile frame, moved by pushback
specs.Unloading: First pallet removed, following pallets advance by gravity
specs.Benefits: Saves space, saves time, less damage to unit

products.metaDescription: PROPAL 3 pushback carrier: up to 9 pallets deep, 1200 kg max pallet load, gravity-return LIFO system for efficient storage.
products.fi_description: Pushback-akkumulaatiovarastointijärjestelmä LIFO-periaatteella. Trukin kuljettajan ei tarvitse ajaa hyllystöön. Syvyys jopa 9 kuormalavaa, kantavuus jopa 1 200 kg per lava.
products.fi_metaDescription: PROPAL 3 pushback-kuljetin: LIFO-varastointi jopa 9 lavan syvyydellä. Turvallinen ja tehokas ratkaisu.

products.name: PROPAL 3 Outdoor with Canopy
products.description: Outdoor pallet racking with canopy, rear and side cladding for weather protection. Rainwater evacuation system. Ideal for lumber yards, materials yards, and outdoor storage.

useCases.label: Secured Outdoor Unit with Wire Mesh

specs.Rear Cladding: Weather protection for the back of the unit
specs.Configurations: Canopy only, canopy + rear, canopy + sides, canopy + rear + sides

products.metaDescription: PROPAL 3 outdoor racking with canopy: galvanised finish, rainwater evacuation, cladding options. Protected outdoor storage.
products.fi_description: Kuormalavahyllystö ulkokäyttöön. Galvanoitu rakenne, katos ja verhousrakenteet sääsuojauksen varmistamiseksi. Materiaalipihoille ja ulkovarastoille.
products.fi_metaDescription: PROPAL 3 ulkohyllystö: sääsuojattu kuormalavahylly materiaalipihoille ja ulkovarastoille.

products.name: PROPAL 3 Automated Shuttle
products.description: High-density storage using a motorised shuttle for ultra-deep pallet aisles. The shuttle moves along rails to load and unload pallets automatically, removing the need for forklifts inside storage lanes. Compatible with all PROPAL 3 rack dimensions. Remote-controlled or fully automated operation.

specs.Pallet Depth: Very deep aisles for maximum densification

products.metaDescription: PROPAL 3 automated shuttle: motorised pallet shuttle for ultra-deep storage aisles. Remote or fully automated operation. Maximum warehouse densification.
products.fi_description: Shuttle-järjestelmään perustuva varastointiratkaisu suurille kuormalavamäärille. Moottoroitu shuttle liikkuu kiskoja pitkin ja hoitaa lastauksen ja purun automaattisesti. Kauko-ohjattu tai täysin automatisoitu.
products.fi_metaDescription: PROPAL 3 automaattinen shuttle: moottoroitu kuormalavojen käsittely syville varastokäytäville. Maksimaalinen varastotiheys.

products.name: PROPAL 3 Pallet Drawer
products.description: The pallet drawer system provides access on three sides, making ground-level order preparation easier and reducing posture constraints. Ideal for picking operations where ergonomic access to palletised goods is critical.
products.metaDescription: PROPAL 3 pallet drawer: three-sided pallet access for ergonomic order picking. Reduces posture strain at ground level. Professional warehouse solution.
products.fi_description: Kuormalavavetotaso helpottaa tuotteiden keräämistä kolmelta sivulta. Vähentää ergonomista kuormitusta lattiatason keräilytyössä.
products.fi_metaDescription: PROPAL 3 kuormalavavetotaso: kolmelta sivulta käsiksi pääsy, ergonominen keräilyratkaisu. Ammattitason varastointi.

products.name: PROPAL 3 Dynamic Covering
products.description: Dynamic covering placed on standard PROPAL 3 beams converts a static pallet level into a dynamic FIFO solution for boxes. Boxes are loaded from the rear and picked from the front, ensuring stock rotation. Ideal for combining pallet storage with box-level picking.

specs.Operation: Gravity-fed: load from rear, pick from front
specs.Purpose: Convert static pallet level to dynamic box picking

products.metaDescription: PROPAL 3 dynamic covering: convert pallet racking to FIFO box picking. Gravity-fed system for efficient stock rotation. Professional warehouse solution.
products.fi_description: Dynaaminen taso, joka muuttaa staattisen kuormalavatason ratkaisuksi laatikoille. Laatikot kerätään ja lastataan edestäpäin. FIFO-periaate.
products.fi_metaDescription: PROPAL 3 dynaaminen taso: muuttaa lavahyllyn FIFO-laatikkokeräilyyn. Tehokas varastokierto.

products.name: PROPAL 3 Canopy & Cladding
products.description: Protective canopy and cladding system for PROPAL 3 outdoor racking. Includes rear cladding, side cladding, rainwater evacuation and roof finishing angles. Protects stored goods from rain, sun and debris in outdoor yards and materials storage areas.

specs.Options: Canopy only, canopy + rear, canopy + rear + side

products.metaDescription: PROPAL 3 canopy & cladding: weather protection for outdoor pallet racking. Canopy, rear and side cladding with rainwater evacuation. Finland & Baltics.
products.fi_description: Suojaava katos- ja verhousjärjestelmä PROPAL 3 -ulkohyllystöille. Takaverhous, sivuverhous, sadeveden poisto ja katon viimeistelylista.
products.fi_metaDescription: PROPAL 3 katos ja verhous: sääsuojaus ulkokuormalavahyllyille. Katos, taka- ja sivuverhous.

series.fi_description: Suorituskykyinen kuormalavahyllyjärjestelmä raskaiden kuormien varastointiin. Kestävä kylmävalssattu rakenne, kantavuus jopa 18 tonnia per kehikko. Sisä- ja ulkokäyttöön.

series.name: PROPLUS LP3
series.subtitle: Economical, Modular, Upgradable, Dismountable
series.description: Long span, heavy load platform system. Maximum span up to 10 metres. Up to 850 kg/m2 load capacity. EU-certified, designed per Eurocode 3. Fully modular and upgradable.
features: 3 flooring types: wood, grating, sheet metal
Alternative to construction without extra rent

products.name: PROPLUS LP3 Storage Platform
products.description: Complete mezzanine/platform system with load-bearing columns, primary and secondary beams, and flooring. Bolted assembly. Change layout, add square metres, reposition columns.

specs.Flooring: Wood (19/25/38 mm), Steel Grating, Sheet Metal
specs.Footplate: 200 x 200 mm with three-point floor anchoring

accessories.name: Load Struts
accessories.description: Bolted to posts with articulated plate. 6 types depending on column height.

accessories.name: Cross Bracing
accessories.description: For two-tier or heavily loaded platforms. Attached to columns with through-bolt.

accessories.name: Wood Flooring
accessories.description: Tongue-and-groove slats, 19/25/38 mm. White underside for brightness.

accessories.name: Steel Grating
accessories.description: Hot-dip galvanised perforated panels. For sprinkler/smoke suppression systems.

accessories.name: Sheet Metal Flooring
accessories.description: Galvanised panels with folded edges. For wood-prohibited environments.

products.metaDescription: PROPLUS LP3 mezzanine platform: spans up to 10m, load 850 kg/m2, Eurocode 3 certified. Double your warehouse floor space.
products.fi_description: Pitkän jännevälin modulaarinen tasoratkaisu. Kaksin- tai kolminkertaistaa tilan. Jänneväli jopa 10 metriä. 3 lattiatyyppiä: puu, ritilä, teräspelti.
products.fi_metaDescription: PROPLUS LP3 tasoratkaisu: modulaarinen välikerros jopa 10 m jännevälillä. Kaksin- tai kolminkertaista tilasi.

products.name: PROPLUS LP3 Staircases & Safety
products.description: Straight and spiral staircases, certified guardrails, pallet safety gates. Main staircase 34° or secondary 45°. Tilt-up or folding pallet gates.

specs.Main Staircase 34°: Effective width 1,000 mm, overall 1,200 mm, height 1,100–3,500 mm
specs.Secondary Staircase 45°: Effective width 800 mm, overall 1,000 mm, height 1,100–3,900 mm, floor space = height − 131.5 mm
specs.Guardrail Industrial: H 1,035 mm per NF E85-015 — storage platforms
specs.Guardrail Work: H 1,115 mm per EN ISO 14122-3 — near machines/conveyors
specs.Guardrail Public: H 1,075 mm per NF P01-012 — public access buildings
specs.Swing Gate: Overall 1,700 mm, effective 1,395 mm, H 1,035 mm
specs.Sliding Gate: Overall 3,000 mm, effective 1,600 mm, H 1,030 mm

accessories.name: Continuous Handrail Guardrail
accessories.description: Certified guardrail with continuous handrail. Max 1,400 mm between columns.

accessories.name: Metal Toeboard
accessories.description: 100 mm height toe protection at platform edge.

accessories.name: Tilt-Up Pallet Gate
accessories.description: For regular use. Safe pallet loading/unloading. Prevents risk of falling objects.

accessories.name: Folding Pallet Gate
accessories.description: Space-saving folding mechanism for regular pallet handling.

accessories.name: Self-Closing Swing Gate
accessories.description: For occasional use. Overall 1,700 mm, effective width 1,395 mm.

accessories.name: Self-Locking Sliding Gate
accessories.description: For occasional use. Overall 3,000 mm, effective width 1,600 mm.

products.metaDescription: PROPLUS LP3 staircases & safety: 34 and 45 degree stairs, guard rails, pallet gates. Complete platform access solutions.
products.fi_description: Suorat ja kierreportaat sekä sertifioidut kaiteet PROPLUS LP3 -tasoille. Kolme kaidetyyppiä ja useita portasvaihtoehtoja.
products.fi_metaDescription: PROPLUS LP3 portaat ja kaiteet: suorat ja kierreportaat, sertifioidut kaiteet. EU-sertifioitu turvallisuus.

products.name: PROPLUS LP3 Pallet Safety Gates
products.description: Tilt-up and folding pallet safety gates for safe loading and unloading on mezzanine platforms. Prevents falling objects and maintains worker safety when handling palletised goods at height. Two gate types available for regular and intensive use.
products.metaDescription: PROPLUS LP3 pallet safety gates: tilt-up and folding gates for safe mezzanine loading. EU-certified fall prevention. Professional platform solution.
products.fi_description: Kääntö- ja taittuvat lavaturvaportit turvalliseen lastaukseen ja purkuun välitasolla. Estää putoavat esineet. Säännölliseen ja satunnaiseen käyttöön.
products.fi_metaDescription: PROPLUS LP3 lavaturvaportit: kääntö- ja taittuvat portit turvalliseen tasokuormaukseen. EU-sertifioitu.

products.name: PROPLUS LP3 Order Picking Platform
products.description: Tailor-made mezzanine platforms optimised for order picking operations. Multi-level configurations double or triple floor space for efficient pick-pack-ship workflows. Available with integrated conveyors, special colours and custom layouts.
products.metaDescription: PROPLUS LP3 order picking platform: multi-level mezzanine for pick-pack-ship workflows. Conveyor integration, custom layouts. Finland & Baltics.
products.fi_description: Räätälöity tasoratkaisu keräilytoimintoihin. Monitasoinen rakenne kaksin- tai kolminkertaistaa lattiatilan. Integroitavissa kuljettimiin.
products.fi_metaDescription: PROPLUS LP3 keräilytaso: monitasoinen ratkaisu keräilyyn. Kuljettimien integrointi, erikoisvärit saatavilla.

products.name: PROPLUS LP3 Office Platform
products.description: Mezzanine platforms configured for office spaces, conference rooms and administrative areas within industrial buildings. Creates two-storey office environments without permanent construction. Combines with MODUL+ partitioning for complete office solutions.

specs.Partitioning: Compatible with MODUL+ and M85 office partitions

products.metaDescription: PROPLUS LP3 office platform: create two-storey office spaces in industrial buildings. Dismountable mezzanine with partition integration. Finland & Baltics.
products.fi_description: Tasoratkaisu toimisto- ja neuvottelutiloihin teollisuusrakennuksissa. Kaksikerroksinen toimistoalue ilman pysyvää rakentamista. Yhdistettävissä MODUL+-väliseiniin.
products.fi_metaDescription: PROPLUS LP3 toimistotaso: kaksikerroksinen toimistotila teollisuustiloihin. Purettava välikerros väliseinäintegraatiolla.

series.fi_description: Pitkän jännevälin, raskaan kuorman ja erittäin modulaarinen tasoratkaisu. Jänneväli jopa 10 metriä. Kaksin- tai kolminkertaistaa käytettävissä olevan tilan.

series.name: MODUL+
series.tagline: Separate, Organise and Secure Your Space
series.subtitle: Reliable, Economical, Modular, Adaptable
series.description: Economical, easy-to-install wire mesh partitions. Indoor or outdoor use (galvanised). Height up to 6,000 mm. Create storage areas, protect goods, separate dangerous zones.
features: Standard colours: Blue RAL 5019, Grey RAL 7016
Security brackets — cannot be dismantled from outside

products.name: MODUL+ Panels
products.description: Frame made of 20x20 mm square tubes with welded wire mesh 50x50 mm. 7 heights (1,800–3,000 mm), 4 widths (800–1,500 mm). Wire mesh, sheet metal, half mesh, or 5S transparent cladding.

specs.Mesh: Welded wire mesh 50x50 mm / 3 mm thick
specs.Cladding Options: Wire mesh, Sheet metal, Half sheet/half mesh, 5S (transparent synthetic glass)
specs.Post Types: Rectangular 35x30 mm (space-saving, footplate 200x70 mm) or Round Ø55 mm (any angle, footplate 100x100 mm)
specs.Assembly: Inside bracket system — impossible to dismantle from outside

accessories.name: Drop Counter Panel
accessories.description: Pass small items without opening main door. Lockable steel shelf. W 1,130 × H 520 mm.

accessories.name: Wire-Mesh Roof
accessories.description: Secure overhead closure for product storage areas.

accessories.name: Load Strut
accessories.description: Reinforces stability and rigidity on uneven floors.

accessories.name: Finishing Kit
accessories.description: Adjust partition length to fit the space available.

accessories.name: 3D Kit
accessories.description: Add extra space to the original cladding configuration.

accessories.name: Handle with Keypad
accessories.description: Electronic access control for secured areas.

accessories.name: Crash Bar
accessories.description: Emergency exit push bar.

accessories.name: Door Closer
accessories.description: Automatic door closing mechanism.

accessories.name: Cylinder Locks with Master Key
accessories.description: Identical or master-keyed cylinder locks.

products.metaDescription: MODUL+ wire mesh panels: heights up to 6m, welded mesh or steel sheet cladding, secure industrial partitioning.
products.fi_description: Taloudellinen ja helposti asennettava verkkoseinäjärjestelmä. Sisäpuolinen kiinnitysjärjestelmä tekee purkamisen ulkopuolelta mahdottomaksi. Korkeus jopa 6 000 mm.
products.fi_metaDescription: MODUL+ verkkopaneelit: modulaarinen verkkoseinäjärjestelmä turvalliseen osastointiin. Korkeus jopa 6 000 mm.

products.name: MODUL+ Hinged Doors
products.description: Single and double hinged doors. Choice of cladding. Aluminium lever handle, lock with 3 keys. Door opens inwards or outwards. Adjustable for uneven floors.

specs.Double Door Posts: 80 x 80 mm, no crossbar at top for vehicle entry
specs.Lock: Aluminium lever handle, lock with 3 keys
specs.Floor Bolt: Keeps 2nd door closed when not needed
specs.Cladding Options: Wire mesh, sheet metal, half sheet/half mesh, 5S transparent
specs.Low-Cost Option: Full-mesh model with hasp and staple for padlock

products.metaDescription: MODUL+ hinged doors: single and double leaf options, multiple cladding types, integrated locks. Secure access for partitioned areas.
products.fi_description: Saranaovet verkko-, yhdistelmä-, metallilevy- tai 5S-rakenteella. Avaussuunta valittavissa. Mukautuu epätasaiselle lattialle.
products.fi_metaDescription: MODUL+ saranaovet: verkko-, yhdistelmä- tai metallilevyovet verkkoseinäjärjestelmään. Ammattitason osastointi.

products.name: MODUL+ Sliding Doors
products.description: Space-saving sliding doors. Single or double. Do not obstruct traffic aisles. Guide rail system. Lock and latch included.

specs.Rail System: End stop, guide rail top and bottom
specs.Direction: Slides left or right per your requirements
specs.Cladding Options: Wire mesh, sheet metal, half sheet/half mesh, 5S transparent
specs.For Racking: Special hinged and sliding doors for pallet rack bay access

useCases.label: Large Area with Mesh Roof & Sliding Doors

products.metaDescription: MODUL+ sliding doors: space-saving rail system, single and double options, racking bay access versions.
products.fi_description: Tilaa säästävät liukuovet verkkoseinäjärjestelmään. Eivät tuki kulkuväyliä. Saatavana yksi- ja kaksinovisina.
products.fi_metaDescription: MODUL+ liukuovet: tilaa säästävä ovirakennus verkkoseinäjärjestelmään. Yksi- ja kaksinoviset mallit.

products.name: MODUL+ Doors for Racking
products.description: Independent door system designed to secure racking bays without modifying the rack structure. No top crossbars needed, allowing easy forklift access to stored products. Can secure one or more bays and is suitable for narrow aisle configurations.

specs.Bay Coverage: One or more bays per door
specs.Colours: Blue RAL 5019, grey RAL 7016 (others on request)

products.metaDescription: MODUL+ racking doors: secure racking bays independently without structural modification. No top crossbars, narrow aisle compatible. Finland & Baltics.
products.fi_description: Hyllystöstä riippumaton ovijärjestelmä hyllystökäytävien turvaamiseen. Ei yläpalkkia – helppo trukkilähestyminen. Sopii kapeisiin käytäviin.
products.fi_metaDescription: MODUL+ hyllystöovet: itsenäinen ovijärjestelmä hyllystökäytävien turvaamiseen. Ei rakenteellisia muutoksia.

products.name: MODUL+ Outdoor Partitioning
products.description: Hot-dip galvanised MODUL+ partitioning designed for outdoor and damp environments. Delimits outdoor storage areas, shelters and yards. Withstands weather exposure while maintaining full modularity and security features.

specs.Doors: Hinged or sliding, single or double

products.metaDescription: MODUL+ outdoor partitioning: galvanised wire mesh for outdoor storage yards. Weather-resistant, modular, secure. Professional solution for Finland & Baltics.
products.fi_description: Kuumasinkitty MODUL+-verkkoseinä ulko- ja kosteisiin tiloihin. Ulkovarastoalueiden ja pihojen rajaaminen säänkestävällä rakenteella.
products.fi_metaDescription: MODUL+ ulko-osastointi: galvanoitu verkkoseinä ulkovarastopihoille. Säänkestävä ja modulaarinen.

products.name: MODUL+ Sensitive Goods Protection
products.description: Secure storage enclosures for high-value, hazardous or sensitive goods. Features wire mesh roof options, chemical-compatible retention trays, and integrated pallet racking bays. Ideal for pharmaceuticals, electronics, chemicals and restricted inventory.

specs.Roof: Wire mesh roof option for full enclosure
specs.Features: Retention trays for chemicals, advert panels
specs.Colours: Blue RAL 5019, grey RAL 7016 (others on request)

products.metaDescription: MODUL+ secure enclosures for high-value and hazardous goods. Wire mesh roof, chemical retention, lockable doors. Professional security solution.
products.fi_description: Turvalliset varastotilat arvokkaille, vaarallisille tai arkaluonteisille tuotteille. Verkkokattovaihtoehto, kemikaalien valuma-altaat ja lukittavat ovet.
products.fi_metaDescription: MODUL+ turva-aitaus arvokkaille ja vaarallisille tuotteille. Verkkokatot, kemikaalien valuma-altaat.

products.name: MODUL+ Drop Counter & Partitioning Options
products.description: Versatile partitioning add-ons including drop counter panels for passing small items without opening the main door, lockable steel shelves, and various closing options. Enhances functionality of any MODUL+ installation.

specs.Locking: Steel shelf locks from inside with chains
specs.Colours: Blue RAL 5019, grey RAL 7016 (others on request)

products.metaDescription: MODUL+ drop counter and partitioning options: service hatches, lockable shelves, closing panels. Versatile add-ons for wire mesh partitions.
products.fi_description: Monipuoliset osastointilisävarusteet: luukkupaneelit pienten esineiden luovutukseen, lukittavat teräshyllyt ja sulkemisvaihtoehdot.
products.fi_metaDescription: MODUL+ luukku ja osastointivaihtoehdot: palveluluukut, lukittavat hyllyt verkkoseinäjärjestelmiin.

series.fi_description: Taloudellinen ja helposti asennettava verkkoseinäjärjestelmä. Sisä- tai ulkokäyttöön (galvanoitu versio ulkotiloihin). Korkeus jopa 6 000 mm. Täysin modulaarinen.
fi_features: Yksin- tai kaksinoviset saranoilla tai liukuovilla
